overall.description: A nighttime exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the iconic FF:06:B5 statue. The camera crosses a wet intersection with neon-lit skyscrapers, circles the mysterious golden monument, and continues down illuminated streets with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with zebra crossing

events.description: yellow futuristic vehicle passes through the intersection from right to left
ego begins crossing the street after the vehicle passes

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then proceeding to cross the wet street toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket crossing the street toward the camera

entered.detail: tall glass skyscraper with grid-pattern illuminated windows dominating the left side
yellow zebra crossing markings on wet reflective asphalt
large digital advertisement displaying a woman's face with red tones
tall pole with bright white light illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with a towering glass skyscraper on the left and holographic billboards glowing on the right. The camera waits at a crosswalk as a yellow vehicle passes, then begins crossing the wet street toward a pedestrian in blue approaching from the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching the FF:06:B5 monument

events.description: entering the plaza area with the large golden statue becoming visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the FF:06:B5 statue with steady pace

entered.detail: large golden monument with intricate geometric carvings and tiered structure
yellow industrial walkway structure with railings spanning above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving from the street into an open plaza, the camera approaches the iconic FF:06:B5 golden statue. The Corpo Plaza tower looms large on the left while an industrial yellow overhead structure spans the plaza above. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza directly surrounding the FF:06:B5 statue

events.description: camera begins circling counter-clockwise around the statue to view different angles
moving into darker shadow area behind the statue with reduced ambient light

agents.ego_description: circling around the FF:06:B5 statue and looking up at its intricate details and digital display

entered.detail: small palm plants and shrubs arranged around the statue base
illuminated text reading FF:06:B5 on the statue base

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the massive golden FF:06:B5 statue in a counter-clockwise motion, examining its intricate carvings and the mysterious digital code displayed on its base. Moving from the front to the back of the monument, the lighting shifts from warm ambient glow to darker shadows under the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street extending into the distance with commercial storefronts

events.description: leaving the statue plaza and entering the street extending eastward
passing a digital speed limit sign displaying 40

agents.ego_description: walking away from the statue down the wet city street toward the next intersection

entered.detail: digital street sign displaying speed limit 40
illuminated commercial entrance with bright yellow lighting
crossing roads with traffic lights and additional holographic billboards

segments.scene_description: Departing the plaza, the camera moves down a wet city street lined with neon storefronts and holographic advertisements. Passing a digital speed limit sign, the view extends toward the next intersection with glowing building lights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling neon intersection through a monumental plaza and back into the rain-slicked city streets. It begins at a futuristic crosswalk beneath towering glass skyscrapers and glowing billboards, moving across the wet pavement as a yellow vehicle passes. As the camera enters the open plaza, the scene expands to reveal the massive golden FF:06:B5 statue under a heavy industrial overhead structure, with the surrounding neon lights reflecting off the ground. The camera then circles the monument in a counter-clockwise motion, shifting from the warm ambient glow of the statue's carvings into deeper shadows before turning away from the plaza. Finally, the view glides down a street lined with holographic advertisements and digital signs, extending toward a distant intersection where building lights shimmer on the wet asphalt.
